title: March 2019 Back Page – A Message From Meera
summary: You will soon receive ballots in the mail to elect two members to serve three year terms on AVEC’s Board of Directors. Here are the candidates in alphabetical order. Phyllis Clough : from Old Harbor on Kodiak Island, Phyllis has worked for the Kodiak Island Borough School District for over 37 years. She also serves on the O...
